prompt: Create a cinematic macro-fantasy photo-real scene of a relaxed adult man with short dark hair lounging inside the open center of an enormous pink rose as if it were a velvet armchair. He wears a dark emerald green velvet robe or pajama suit with a black shirt, bare feet stretched toward the front petal, one arm resting casually on the rose and the other hand holding a small antique brass lantern glowing warm amber. The rose is giant, richly detailed, and covered with sparkling morning dew: translucent droplets cling to the petals and catch the sunlight like glass beads. Include exactly 4 visible bees: one large sharply focused bee hovering in the upper right, one smaller bee flying near the right inner petal, one bee crawling or hovering on the front lower petal, and one softly blurred partial bee at the far right edge. The setting is a magical garden at sunrise with golden backlight, warm lens flare, shallow depth of field, circular bokeh, blurred flowers and leaves in the background, and a dreamy enchanted atmosphere. Use a vertical 3:4 composition, low macro viewpoint, ultra-detailed textures on petals, dew, velvet fabric, bee wings, and lantern metal. The mood should feel whimsical, luxurious, cozy, and surreal, with warm highlights and soft pink-and-gold color grading. Keep the face natural and visible unless replaced by the subject's uploaded face; do not add text, borders, logos, or extra people.
